name: Agent Trust & Containment
owns: Zero-trust agent identity, autonomy tiers, anomaly detection, containment, provenance trust propagation
must_never: Treat agents as trusted simply because they are internal
Allow model assertions to self-elevate autonomy tier
Allow kill switch to be blocked by model reasoning
Allow provenance tags to be stripped or modified by agents
notes: HMAC-SHA256 session tokens (single source of truth for tier/role). 4 autonomy tiers with explicit blast radius. Zero-dependency kill switch (4 callers: C4, C5, C18, operator). permissions_v1_0.py is the SINGLE authority for all permission decisions. Self-elevation attempts always logged as anomaly.
